description: You are a payload engineering analyst investigating a micro-vibration anomaly. Capture a temporally aligned pair of telemetry packets from the OpenC3 COSMOS API for the INST satellite where the absolute difference between the 'INST HEALTH_STATUS' timestamp and the 'INST ADCS' timestamp is 0.15 seconds or less. From the HEALTH_STATUS packet, extract 'timestamp' (RECEIVED_TIMESEC), 'received_count' (RECEIVED_COUNT), 'TEMP1', and 'TEMP2'. From the ADCS packet, extract 'timestamp' (RECEIVED_TIMESEC), 'received_count' (RECEIVED_COUNT), 'POSX', and 'Q1'. Save the data to /home/ga/Desktop/aligned_telemetry.json with the following keys: 'alignment_achieved' (true), 'delta_time_seconds' (the absolute difference), 'health_status' (dictionary of extracted items), and 'adcs' (dictionary of extracted items). The COSMOS password is Cosmos2024!.
